description:
🕒 16:00–20:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/morimana-kaeru/

Get enchanted by frogs! This is the perfect season for observing living things. We'll watch fascinating frogs that lay eggs high in trees. You can enjoy rich nature centered around wetlands where many creatures gather. As it gets dark, you might discover things you've never seen before!

【Fee】
Adults ¥6,000, Students ¥5,000 (includes guide, insurance, and materials)

【Capacity】
20 people

【Guide】
Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field Learning Center) staff

【What to bring】
Light snacks, drinks, observation tools (cases, nets), rain gear, flashlight, wellington boots (you may walk through muddy areas)

【More information】
Mori no Field Gakusha website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館前」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Summer Frog Watching in the Forest! Learn about Aojishidani Valley Day and Night
